body:
nekomimidusteon:

glasses on a girl are really cute because then you can take the glasses off the girl and she fumbles around helplessly and you can grope her as you “help” her move around and lead her directly to your bed to pin her down and kiss her stupid.

note this only works if the girl with glasses has absolutely awful vision, like the catgirl princess.
